item.title: 存储像素艺术 NFT 一千年 | Storing Pixel Art NFTs One Thousand Years
item.description:
单击图像在 Youtube 上观看视频

将非常轻的图像存储至少一千年以保存历史事实是我们的工作！ 最后在Pixa.Pics，我们已经构建了存储周围的所有部件，它们可以根据需要扩展，并且比智能手机拍摄的照片轻 1000 倍，哦，是的，我们做到了！

不要把你的想法留给自己，与我们分享你的意见！

一旦被暂停，vipert 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，vipert 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，vipert 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 vipert 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是您可以用来标记 vipert 的操作：

使 vipert 的所有帖子不那么显眼

报告其他不当行为

Unflagging vipert will restore default visibility to their posts. Unflagning vipert 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Click the image to watch the video on Youtube

Storing very light images for at least a thousand years to preserve historical facts is our job! Finally at Pixa.Pics we have built all the parts that are around the storage, they can expand as desired and are 1000 times lighter than a photo taken by a smartphone, oh yes, we are getting there!

Don't keep your thoughts for yourself, share your opinion with us!

Adam Žalůdek - Dec 31 '22

Once suspended, vipert will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, vipert will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by vipert will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If vipert is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag vipert:

Make all posts by vipert less visible

vipert consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging vipert will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: vipert

item.title: 使用 OpenAI、AWS Step 函数、AWS Lambda 和 CDK 构建人工智能驱动的无服务器膳食计划器 | Building an AI powered and Serverless meal planner with OpenAI, AWS Step functions, AWS Lambda and CDK
item.description:
结合无服务器技术，我们可以更快地创建应用程序，同时仍保持随着时间的推移进行迭代和改进的灵活性。

在本文中，我将向您展示如何构建一个应用程序来发送电子邮件，其中包含根据用户提供的一组食材生成的每周膳食计划。 我们将使用 OpenAI 的 API 以及 AWS 无服务器服务：Step Functions、AWS Lambda 和 Amazon SES。

我们将为 Lambda 代码使用 NodeJs 运行时和打字稿，为 IaC 使用 CDK。

我们要建造什么？

我们将创建一个应用程序，允许用户通过 API 提交包含一组食品成分和电子邮件地址的请求。 然后，它会异步地向用户发送一封电子邮件，其中包含整周的膳食计划和详细食谱：

这是我们要构建的应用程序的架构图：

该解决方案的相关部分：

  • 我们使用一个步骤函数来协调 Lambda 函数的调用，这些函数将请求发送到 OpenAI 的 API，以根据提示生成菜谱以及每个菜谱的图像。

  • 我们使用 S3 存储桶来存储生成的食谱图像。 这些图像通过 CloudFront 分发提供。

  • 然后使用 SES 通过电子邮件发送生成的膳食计划。 我们使用SES 模板功能为每个用户发送个性化的电子邮件。

  • 长话短说

    您可以在此处找到完整的存储库及其部署管道👇
    让我们深入研究代码

    您可以点击此链接开始。 此 API 的使用不是免费的，但是新帐户可获得免费积分（令牌）以开始试验。

    定义状态机

    该状态机的第一步是生成一周的膳食计划。 第二步涉及为每个食谱生成图片，然后将其保存在 S3 存储桶中。 使用 Map 状态对每个配方并行处理，这有利于减少状态机的整体执行时间。 最后，最后一个重要步骤是发送包含膳食计划的电子邮件：

    这转化为 CDK 中的流畅状态机定义：

    您可以通过此链接找到状态机的完整 CDK 定义。

    定义 Lambda 函数

    这一步的挑战性部分是找到最佳提示，以从 OpenAI完成 API产生良好且一致的结果。 我使用了text-davinci-003 GPT 模型（也称为 GPT-3.5）。

    当我尝试不同的提示时，这些建议非常适合根据连贯的成分列表制定有趣的膳食计划。 我什至能够请求一个 JSON 格式的结构化结果，准备好由 Lambda 函数处理。 我还试验了temperature 、 TopP和max_tokens等参数，以寻找获得令人满意结果的最佳点。

    鉴于我们的用例，此提示会产生最佳结果：

     Generate a dinner meal plan for the whole week with these ingredients <a comma seperated list of ingredients> and with other random ingredients. Result must be in json format Each meal recipe contains a name, a five sentences for instructions and an array of ingredients

    下面是处理膳食计划生成的 Lambda 函数的代码：

    如上图所示，OpenAI API 密钥存储在一个秘密中。 在此示例中，我们使用AWS parameters and secrets Lambda 扩展从 Lambda 中读取秘密值。 您可以在此处了解有关此 Lambda 扩展的更多信息。

  • 尽管完成 API 在 JSON 中提供一致的响应模型，但出于某种原因，JSON 对象上的属性在我试验 API 时没有一致的大小写。 因此在返回结果之前使用 getProperty 辅助函数； 此函数确保从对象获取属性值，而不管其大小写。

此 Lambda 函数与上一个函数类似。 我们使用createCompletion API 生成的配方名称，以便通过调用createImage从中创建图像（此 API 使用DALL-E 模型生成图像）：

在我们的示例中，我们只对一个图像感兴趣。 图片 URL 在一小时后过期，这就是我们将其传递给负责下载图片并将其存储在 S3 存储桶中的上传配方图片到存储Lambda 的原因。

电子邮件的发送使用 SES。 但首先，Lambda 函数准备一个模板数据，其中包含生成电子邮件所需的元素：


在下面的部分中，我们将看到如何使用 CDK 创建新的 SES 电子邮件身份以及用于发送恶意计划的电子邮件模板。

注意：您可以通过此链接找到这些 Lambda 函数的 CDK 定义。

配置 SES

在此示例中，我们使用已在 Route53 公共托管区域中定义的域； 然后 SES 电子邮件身份 DNS 验证是无缝的。 我们还在这个嵌套堆栈上创建膳食计划电子邮件模板：

您只能向经过验证的身份发送电子邮件，并且每 24 小时只能发送有限数量的电子邮件。 点击此链接了解沙盒模式配额以及如何退出它。

将 API 网关与 Step 函数工作流集成

使用 CDK 创建带有 Step Function 集成的 RestApi 非常容易，尽管有点冗长：

我们需要创建一个角色，将 Api 网关授予states:StartExecution Step Function。 在执行步骤函数之前，每个请求都会通过 API 网关 JSON 模式模型验证进行验证。

包起来

在本文中，我们了解了将 OpenAI API 与无服务器架构相结合如何帮助以最少的设置和配置构建 AI 驱动的应用程序。 这两个世界的能力都是构建 MVP 和更快迭代的重要推动因素。

这个应用程序可以通过考虑食物限制甚至通过创建人工智能驱动的每周新闻信来进一步改进。

您可以在此处找到此应用程序的完整源代码：
延伸阅读

使用 API Gateway 创建 Step Functions API
琼斯-codehooks.io-22 年 12 月 18 日

马丁穆勒 - 22 年 12 月 18 日

一旦被暂停，aws-builders 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

取消暂停后，aws-builders 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，aws-builders 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 aws-builders 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 aws-builders：

降低 aws-builders 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 aws-builders 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

OpenAI’s generative capabilities offer new possibilities when building applications. Combined with Serverless technologies, we can create applications faster while still maintaining the flexibility to iterate and to improve them over time.

In this article, I will show you how to build an application that sends emails containing generated weekly meal plans from a set of ingredients a user provides. We will use OpenAI’s APIs along with AWS Serverless services: Step Functions, AWS Lambda, and Amazon SES.

We will use NodeJs runtime and typescript for the Lambda code as well as CDK for IaC.

What are we going to build ?

We will create an application that allows users to submit via an API a request containing a set of food ingredients and an email address. It will then, asynchronously, send to the user an email containing a meal plan with detailed recipes for a whole week:

Here is the architecture diagram of the application we are going to build:

The relevant parts of this solution:

  • We use a step function to orchestrate the invocations of Lambda functions that send requests to OpenAI’s APIs to generate recipes from a prompt as well as an image for each recipe.

  • We use the S3 bucket to store the generated recipe images. These images are served via a CloudFront distribution.

  • The generated meal plan is then sent via email using SES. We use the SES templates capability to send personalized emails for each user.

  • The Rest API gateway has a POST route with an integration to the meal planner Step Function.

TL;DR

You can find the full repository with its deployment pipeline here 👇
GitHub - ziedbentahar/serverless-meal-planner-with-aws-and-openai

Let’s deep dive into the code

☝️ Before starting: In order to use OpenAI APIs, you will need to sign up and to create an API KEY. You can follow this link to get started. The use of this API is not free, however new accounts get free credits (tokens) to start experimenting.

Defining the state machine

The first step of this state machine is to generate a meal plan for a week. The second step involves generating a picture for each recipe and then saving it on a S3 bucket. The processing is done in parallel for each recipe using a Map state, this has the advantage to reduce the overall execution time of the state machine. And finally, the last important step is the sending of the email containing the meal plan:

Which translates to this fluent state machine definition in CDK:

You can find the complete CDK definition of the state machine following this link.

Defining the Lambda functions

1- Generate meal plan Lambda:

The challenging part about this step was to find the best prompt that yields good and consistent results from OpenAI completion API. I used the text-davinci-003 GPT model (also referred as GPT-3.5).

When I tried out different prompts, the suggestions were quite good for producing interesting meal plans given a list of coherent ingredients. I was even able to request a structured result in JSON format ready to be processed by the Lambda function. I also experimented with parameters such as temperature, TopP and max_tokens searching for the sweet spot that gets satisfying results.

This prompt produces the best results given our use case:

Generate a dinner meal plan for the whole week with these ingredients <a comma seperated list of ingredients> and with other random ingredients.
Result must be in json format
Each meal recipe contains a name, a five sentences for instructions and an array of ingredients

And here is the code of the Lambda function that handles the generation of the meal plan:

☝️ Some notes:

  • As depicted on the diagram above, The OpenAI API key is stored on a secret. In this example we use the AWS parameters and secrets Lambda extension to read the secret value from the Lambda. You can learn more about this Lambda extension here.

  • Even though the completion API was providing consistent response models in JSON, for some reason, the properties on the JSON object were not having a consistent casing as I was experimenting with the API. Hence the use of the getProperty helper function before returning the result; this function ensures getting a property value from an object regardless of its casing.

2- Generate recipe image Lambda:

This Lambda function is similar to the previous one. We use the recipe name that createCompletion API has generated in order to create an image from it by calling createImage (this API uses DALL-E models for image generation) :

createImage API returns an array of URLs, the size of this array depends on the number of variation of the images we want to generate. In our example we are interested in only one single image. The image URL expires after one hour, here is why we pass it to the upload-recipe-image-to-storage Lambda that has the responsibility to download the image and to store it on a S3 Bucket.

3- Send meal plan email Lambda:

The sending of the email uses SES. But first, the Lambda function prepares a template data containing the necessary elements to generate the email:


On the section below, we will see how to use CDK to create a new SES email identity as well as the email template that is used to send the mal plan.

Note: You can find the CDK definitions of these Lambda functions following this link.

Configuring SES

On this example, we use a domain that is already defined in the Route53 public hosted zone; The SES email identity DNS validation is then seamless. We also create the meal plan email template on this nested stack:

☝️ Note: By default, an SES account is in sandbox mode. You are allowed to send emails only to verified identities and you can only send a limited number of emails per 24-hour period. Follow this link to understand the sandbox mode quotas and how to move out of it.

Integrating the API Gateway with the Step function workflow

Creating the RestApi with the Step Function integration is quite easy with CDK, although a bit verbose:

We need to create a role that grants the Api Gateway to states:StartExecution the Step Function. Each request gets validated with the API gateway JSON schema model validation before the execution of the step function.

Wrapping up

In this post, we have seen how combining OpenAI APIs with serverless architecture can help building AI-powered applications with minimal setup and configuration. The capabilities of both of these two worlds are great enablers for building MVPs and iterating faster.

This application can be improved further by taking into account food restrictions or even by creating an AI powered weekly news letter.

You can find the full source code of this application here:
GitHub - ziedbentahar/serverless-meal-planner-with-aws-and-openai

Further readings

OpenAI API Text Competion
OpenAI API Image generation
Creating a Step Functions API Using API Gateway
Working with models and mapping templates
Advanced email personalization
aws-cdk-lib.aws_stepfunctions module · AWS CDK

Jones - codehooks.io - Dec 18 '22

Martin Muller - Dec 18 '22

Srinivas Kandukuri - Dec 17 '22

Odewole Babatunde Samson - Dec 16 '22

Once suspended, aws-builders will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, aws-builders will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by aws-builders will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If aws-builders is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag aws-builders:

Make all posts by aws-builders less visible

aws-builders consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging aws-builders will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: zied

item.title: 评论：在本机应用程序中包装 React 网站的方法 | Reviewed: Ways to Wrap a React Website in a Native App
item.description:
由于它们的效率、速度和创建高性能用户界面的能力，它们被开发人员和公司广泛采用。

作为一家专注于 React 和 React Native 的软件公司，我们经常被问及如何将 React 网站包装在原生应用程序中或如何在 Web 和移动应用程序之间共享代码。 这是许多开发人员和公司在尝试扩大范围并在多个平台上提供服务时面临的一个相关问题。 本文将介绍解决此问题并将 React 网站包装在本机应用程序中的一些选项。

但是，为什么要将 React 网站包装在本机应用程序中并将其发布到应用程序商店？ 这可能对您的项目有益的原因有很多。

首先，拥有网站的应用程序版本可以改善用户体验和参与度。 用户可以通过其移动设备上的专用应用程序轻松访问您的内容或服务，而无需通过浏览器进行导航。 这可以导致更高的保留率和更高的用户满意度。

其次，在应用商店上发布您的应用可以让您接触到更广泛的受众并提高您的品牌知名度。 应用商店优化 (ASO) 技术可以帮助您在搜索结果中排名更高，让潜在用户更容易发现您的应用。

最后，使用 React Native 将您的 React 网站包装在本机应用程序中也可以提高性能和速度。 本机应用程序可以访问特定于设备的功能，例如推送通知、相机、GPS 等，这些功能可以增强您的应用程序的功能并提供更好的用户体验。

将您的 React 网站包装在本机应用程序中并将其发布到应用程序商店可以使您的项目受益。 如果您想扩大影响范围并与更多用户互动，则值得考虑。

网络视图

到目前为止，这是完成任务的最简单方法，就是将您的 React 网站包装到WebView中。 此组件允许您在本机应用程序中显示 Web 内容，为用户提供与使用浏览器相同的体验。 尽管 WebView 这个名字只被Android平台使用，通常是 iOS 的实现， WKWebView也被称为相同的。

虽然这是最简单的方法，但有一个问题。 根据Apple App Store Review Guidelines ，如果 WebView 遵守某些准则，则它们是可以接受的。 例如，WebView 必须用于显示用户生成的内容，不应在应用程序内提供浏览体验。 此外，如果您的应用程序设计为本地内容和基于 Web 的内容的混合体，则使用 WebView 可能是可以接受的。

另一方面，Google Play 商店也有针对在原生应用中使用 WebView 的具体指南。 根据他们的政策，商店不允许应用只是网站的 WebView 或仅对现有网站进行微小更改或增强的应用。 但是，在可以接受使用 WebView 时存在一些例外情况。 例如，假设您的应用程序提供了 Web 应用程序之外的其他功能，例如离线支持或访问特定于设备的功能（如相机和 GPS）。 在这种情况下，它可能会在 Google Play 商店中被允许。

此外，假设您的应用旨在替代基于网络的平台，而不是仅仅显示与网站相同的内容。 在这种情况下，它可能有资格在 Google Play 商店中分发。 在这种情况下，您应该确保您的应用符合所有其他政策要求和指南，然后再提交审核。

请务必注意，两家应用商店均保留拒绝任何不符合其政策和准则的应用的权利。 因此，在使用 WebView 或任何其他方法将您的 React 网站包装到本机应用程序之前，请彻底阅读并理解他们的规则和规定，以避免被拒绝或从商店中移除。

反应本机

在开发混合应用程序时，React Native 是一个流行的选择。 它是由 Facebook 创建的开源框架，结合了 React 和 React Native 的优点。 它使开发人员能够构建与多个平台兼容的高性能应用程序，同时提供对特定于设备的功能（如推送通知）的访问。

使用 React Native 将 React 网站包装在原生应用程序中的好处之一是，它允许您为用户创建真正的原生体验。 这意味着该应用程序的外观和感觉都像本机应用程序。

与使用 Java 或 Swift 开发的传统原生应用程序相比，React Native 具有多项优势。 首先，它支持 Web 和移动应用程序之间的代码共享，从而在开发过程中节省时间和资源。 其次，它提供了对可以轻松集成到您的项目中的预构建组件和模块的庞大生态系统的访问。

要使用 React Native 将您的 React 网站包装在本机应用程序中，您需要创建一个新的 React Native 项目并将您的网站文件添加到该项目。

使用 React Native 将您的 React 网站包装在原生应用程序中可以避免您因违反政策而被拒绝或从商店中移除。 虽然将 React 网站包装在 WebView 中是创建原生应用程序的最简单方法，但它可能无法满足应用程序商店的严格要求。 相比之下，使用 React Native 需要做更多的工作，但可以为您提供真正的原生体验和更好的性能。 此外，使用 React Native 开发的应用程序很容易被应用程序商店接受，因为它们使用原生组件而不是 WebView。

科尔多瓦

它是一个开源移动应用程序开发框架，允许开发人员使用 HTML、CSS 和 JavaScript 创建跨平台应用程序。 它还提供对特定于设备的功能（如相机、GPS 等）的访问，这些功能可用于增强应用程序的功能并提供更好的用户体验。

虽然 Cordova 曾经是混合应用程序的流行工具，但最近它一直在失去人气。 最新的2022 年 StackOverflow 开发人员调查显示，一个明确的信号表明，75% 的开发人员表示，如果有其他选择，他们不会使用它。

这种下降的主要原因是随着越来越多的开发人员转向使用 React Native 或类似框架，Cordova 的资源和支持越来越少。 这使得开发人员在使用 Cordova 时很难解决问题或找到解决方案。

总的来说，虽然 Cordova 可能仍然是某些项目的可行选择，但与其他替代方案相比，其受欢迎程度和局限性的下降使得它对许多希望将其网站包装在本机应用程序中的开发人员的吸引力降低。

反应本机网络

在 Lexis Solutions，我们最喜欢将 React 应用程序包装到本地应用程序中的方法是@necolas的react-native-web库。 这个库将 React Native 组件和 API 的强大功能带到了网络上。 它允许开发人员创建可跨不同设备和输入模式访问的 Web 应用程序，同时呈现语义 HTML 标记。 该库允许开发人员在 Web 和移动应用程序之间共享代码，使他们能够在两个平台之间建立桥梁。 您可以使用相同的代码库构建 iOS、Android 和 Web 应用程序。

它的工作原理是使用您的网络捆绑器（仅支持 Webpack）的功能将react-native导入别名为react-native-web 。 这样，当您的 React Native 应用程序从react-native导入组件和 API 时，您的网络应用程序会导入 React 等效项。 您可以在其详细文档中找到支持的功能。

这是一个将 React 应用程序包装在原生应用程序中的 A+ 解决方案，我们已经在医疗保健、电子商务和金融领域的许多生产应用程序中使用了它。

概括

总之，有几个选项可用于将您的 React 网站包装在本机应用程序中，包括使用 WebView、React Native、Cordova 和 React-Native-Web。 每个选项都有优点和缺点； 选择最终取决于项目的要求和开发团队的技能。

如果您不确定哪个选项最适合您的项目或需要帮助将您的 React 网站包装在本机应用程序中，请给我们留言。 我们 Lexis Solutions 经验丰富的开发人员团队可以提供指导和支持，以确保您的想法获得成功。 今天联系我们！

Bilyal Mestanov — Co-founder at Lexis Solutions Bilyal Mestanov — Lexis Solutions联合创始人



原文:

React and React Native are the most popular technologies for developing web and mobile applications right now. They are widely adopted by developers and companies alike due to their efficiency, speed, and ability to create high-performance user interfaces.

As a software company specializing in React & React Native, we often get asked how to wrap a React website in a native app or share code between web and mobile apps. It’s a relevant question that many developers and companies face when trying to expand their reach and offer their services on multiple platforms. This article will cover some options for solving this issue and wrapping a React website in a native app.

But why would you want to wrap a React website in a native app and publish it on the app stores? There are several reasons why this might be beneficial for your project.

First, having an app version of your website can improve user experience and engagement. Users can easily access your content or services through a dedicated app on their mobile devices without navigating through a browser. This can result in higher retention rates and increased user satisfaction.

Secondly, publishing your app on the app stores can give you access to a broader audience and increase your brand visibility. App store optimization (ASO) techniques can help you rank higher in search results, making it easier for potential users to discover your app.

Finally, wrapping your React website in a native app using React Native can also improve performance and speed. Native apps have access to device-specific features like push notifications, cameras, GPS, etc., which can enhance the functionality of your app and provide a better user experience.

Wrapping your React website in a native app and publishing it on the app stores can benefit your project. It’s worth considering if you want to expand your reach and engage with more users.

WebView

This is, by far, the easiest way to achieve the task is to wrap your React website into a WebView. This component allows you to display web content within your native app, giving users the same experience as if using a browser. Even though the name WebView is used by the Android platform only, often iOS’s implementation, WKWebView is also called the same.

While this is the easiest way, there is a catch. The Apple App Store and the Google Play Store have specific requirements for using WebView on native apps.

According to the Apple App Store Review Guidelines, WebViews are acceptable if they adhere to certain guidelines. For example, WebViews must be used to display user-generated content and should not offer a browsing experience within the app. Additionally, if your app is designed to be a hybrid of native and web-based content, it may be acceptable to use WebViews.

On the other hand, the Google Play Store also has specific guidelines for using WebView in native apps. According to their policy, apps that are just a WebView of a website or have only minor changes or enhancements to existing websites are not allowed on the store. However, there are some exceptions when using WebView is acceptable. For example, suppose your app provides additional functionality beyond what is available in a web application, such as offline support or access to device-specific features like camera and GPS. In that case, it may be allowed on the Google Play Store.

Additionally, suppose your app is designed to be an alternative to a web-based platform rather than just displaying the same content as the website. In that case, it may be eligible for distribution on the Google Play Store. In this case, you should ensure that your app meets all other policy requirements and guidelines before submitting it for review.

It’s important to note that both app stores reserve the right to reject any app that does not meet their policies and guidelines. Therefore, before wrapping your React website in a native app using WebView or any other method, thoroughly read and understand their rules and regulations to avoid rejection or removal from the stores.

React Native

React Native is a popular choice when it comes to developing hybrid apps. It’s an open-source framework created by Facebook that combines the benefits of both React and React Native. It enables developers to build high-performance applications compatible with multiple platforms while providing access to device-specific features like push notifications.

One of the benefits of using React Native to wrap your React website in a native app is that it allows you to create a truly native experience for your users. While WebView displays web content within a native app, React Native makes native components that render on the device’s UI. This means that the app looks and feels like a native application.

Compared to traditional native applications developed in Java or Swift, React Native offers several advantages. First, it enables code sharing between web and mobile apps, saving time and resources during development. Second, it provides access to a vast ecosystem of pre-built components and modules that can be easily integrated into your project.

To wrap your React website in a native app using React Native, you’ll need to create a new React Native project and add your website files to the project.

Using React Native to wrap your React website in a native app can save you from rejection or removal from the stores due to policy violations. While wrapping your React website in a WebView is the easiest way to create a native app, it may not meet the strict requirements of app stores. In contrast, using React Native requires more work but can provide you with a truly native experience and better performance. Moreover, apps developed using React Native are easily accepted by app stores because they use native components rather than WebViews.

Cordova

Cordova is another possible tool for wrapping react websites in native apps. It’s an open-source mobile application development framework that allows developers to create cross-platform apps using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It also provides access to device-specific features like camera, GPS, etc., which can be used to enhance the functionality of your app and provide a better user experience.

While Cordova used to be a popular tool for hybrid apps, it has been losing popularity recently. One clear signal for this is the latest StackOverflow Developer Survey 2022, showing that 75% of developers say they would not use it, given other options.

The main reason for this decline is that as more developers move towards using React Native or similar frameworks, Cordova has fewer resources and support. This makes it challenging for devs to troubleshoot issues or find solutions when working with Cordova.

Overall, while Cordova may still be a viable option for some projects, its declining popularity and limitations compared to other alternatives make it less appealing for many developers looking to wrap their websites in native apps.

React-Native-Web

Our favorite way of wrapping a react app in a native app here at Lexis Solutions is the react-native-web library by @necolas. This library brings the power of React Native Components and APIs to the web. It allows developers to create web applications that are accessible across different devices and input modes while rendering semantic HTML tags. This library allows developers to share code between web and mobile applications, enabling them to create a bridge between the two platforms. You can build iOS, Android, and Web apps with the same codebase.

It works by aliasing the react-native import to react-native-web using your web bundler's (Only Webpack supported) capabilities. This way, while your React Native apps import components and APIs from react-native, your web-app imports the React equivalent. You can find the supported features in their detailed documentation.

This is an A+ solution for wrapping a react app in a native app, and we have used it on many production apps in Healthcare, E-Commerce, and Finance.

Summary

In summary, several options are available for wrapping your React website in a native app, including using WebView, React Native, Cordova, and React-Native-Web. Each option has advantages and disadvantages; the choice ultimately depends on your project’s requirements and your development team’s skills.

If you’re unsure which option is best for your project or need help wrapping your React website in a native app, drop us a line. Our team of experienced developers at Lexis Solutions can provide guidance and support to ensure your idea’s success. Contact us today!

Bilyal Mestanov — Co-founder at Lexis Solutions
